## Tier
2 (small additive feature + hardening â€” no schema/contract changes)

## Branch
agent/nex-case-030-kds-server-authoritative-time

## Problem

**Round 1 â€” server-authoritative time (merged #199):**
KDS elapsed timers used `Date.now()` (client clock) minus the server's `created_at`
timestamp. On a restaurant LAN where client and server clocks drift, every active ticket's
elapsed timer was off by the same constant amount. The freeze path was already correct
because it uses `server.updated_at - server.created_at`. Including `server_now` in every KDS
response lets the client compute a clock offset and correct live elapsed.

**Round 2 â€” KDS hardening (PR #201):**
- `ItemToggled` only broadcast on `admin.orders`, so per-order and per-device subscribers
  (the tablet board) never saw item toggles.
- Recall had no upper bound â€” an order could be recalled indefinitely.
- Time thresholds (warn 15 min / over 25 min) were too lax for kitchen pacing.
- `useKdsEcho` payload handlers used `as any`, masking shape errors, and ignored the
  `.order.archived` terminal event.
- The kitchen single-action READYâ†’SERVED hop fired a spurious observer broadcast on the
  intermediate READY save.

## Success Criterion

**Round 1 (merged):**
- `server_now` (ms epoch) present in KDS `index` Inertia props and all action JSON responses
- `clockOffset` initialized from `serverNow` on page load; refreshed on each action response
- `elapsedFor(ticket, now, clockOffset)` uses corrected time for live tickets; freeze unchanged

**Round 2 (PR #201):**
- `ItemToggled` broadcasts on `admin.orders`, `orders.{order_id}`, and (when present)
  `device.{device_id}`
- Recall capped at `MAX_RECALLS = 5`; returns 422 once the cap is reached
- Thresholds tuned: warn 15â†’10 min, over 25â†’14 min (initial + refill)
- `useKdsEcho` payload handlers type-safe (no `as any`); `.order.archived` listener added
- READY hop uses `saveQuietly()` so only the SERVED save triggers the afterCommit dispatch
- `php artisan test --compact` green; `npm run test:unit` green; `npm run typecheck` exit 0

## Files Changed

**Round 1 (merged #199):** `KdsController.php`, `KDS/Display.vue`, `useKdsBoard.ts`,
`kdsHelpers.ts`, `KdsTicketCard.vue`, `kdsApi.ts`, `kdsHelpers.test.ts`,
`KdsControllerTest.php`, `KdsDisplayTest.php` â€” `server_now` / `clockOffset` plumbing.

**Round 2 (PR #201):**
- `app/Events/Kds/ItemToggled.php` â€” multichannel `broadcastOn()` w/ null-safe `device_order?->device_id`
- `app/Http/Controllers/Admin/KdsController.php` â€” `MAX_RECALLS` guard; `saveQuietly()` on the READY hop
- `resources/js/components/KDS/kdsHelpers.ts` â€” threshold tuning (warn 10 min / over 14 min)
- `resources/js/components/KDS/useKdsEcho.ts` â€” type-safe payload guards + `.order.archived` listener
- `tests/Feature/Admin/KdsControllerTest.php` â€” "recall returns 422 when max recalls reached"
